title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・烈火轟轟

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki takes first place, and even her
rivals compliment her performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They tell her they vastly prefer when she runs with
her heart on her sleeve. Not only that, they also
feel they know Yaeno Muteki better now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears well up in Yaeno's eyes at these words.
Running with her emotions was such a breath of
fresh air. She wants to continue racing this way
with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having gained the recognition she's been
seeking, it's clear from the joyous smile on her
face that she's gained confidence.
